outcomes: Added lian push coverage to central, security, governance, DSH operational, and dedicated full-stack workflows
Corrected host DSH health target to port 58080
Kept branch protection, required checks, and independent approval as NOT_PROVEN
Established canonical merged DSH capability registry
Derived manifest capabilities, operations, surfaces, and runtime posture from explicit owners
Marked historical runtime evidence as not valid for the current commit
Established active DSH contract registry and contract/client drift guard
Removed heuristic product units and local price multiplication
Removed dead store banner, image, search, share, and cart actions
Rebuilt cart around DSH cart and serviceability controllers
Removed seeded addresses, localStorage persistence, random map coordinates, fake subscription success, local cart total calculation, and hardcoded checkout area
Derived checkout service area from live store data
Kept only WLT-supported COD available and removed local payment amount claims
Added client-commerce anti-regression journey guard to lian CI
Separated implementation readiness from same-commit runtime evidence
Removed unsupported claims that mutation journeys were approved

Close and test idempotency headers for every DSH-to-WLT financial mutation
Run DSH PostgreSQL migrations and WLT migrations from clean databases and supported upgrade baselines
Verify checkout, COD, order, partner acceptance, dispatch, delivery, refund, commission, settlement, payout, and reconciliation journeys across required surfaces
